prompt_text:
### Demographics: 68-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.3 kg; Height 156.3 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 203mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 180mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.8kg; 9 months ago 59.7kg; 6 months ago 57.7kg; 3 months ago 60.9kg; current 62.3kg), Height (12 months ago 156.3cm; 9 months ago 156.3cm; 6 months ago 156.3cm; 3 months ago 156.3cm; current 156.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 149mg/g; 9 months ago 115mg/g; 6 months ago 155mg/g; 3 months ago 132mg/g; current 116mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.9g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
